Kendall pricing flagged as too high. Shopping alternatives. Self-manage option still explored.
Kelly confirmed damage occurred after bank possession. Meeting Matt Van Gorder on-site.
Shot video and photos. Sent to Kendall and Matt Van Gorder for quotes.

deals.notes: Residential listing. Sellers underwater by $93K-$143K. Payoff ~$493K, market value $350K-$400K. Vacant 6 months. Double-carrying Pearl Brewery apartment and $2,843/mo VA mortgage. Three paths: short sale, VA assumption, or price cut with cash to close.

Express Offers returned $550K — likely off vs CMA. Showing scheduled May 4 at 2pm.
Full market analysis complete. Underwater confirmed. Three paths defined: short sale, VA assumption, price reduction with cash to close.
Gilberto buyers appear wishy-washy — seller finance likely dead. Need honest price adjustment conversation.
Pricing reality: biggest house in neighborhood, overpriced. Must have honest conversation about price reduction.
